title: yulania × soulangeana
intro: Yulania × soulangeana, also known as the Chinese magnolia or Saucer Magnolia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Yulania schensiana and Magnolia liliiflora. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Yulania × soulangeana include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the flowers, bark, and leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments.
